message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

class Account {
  AccountID : int
  FirstName : string
  LastName : string
  EmailAddressUsername : string
  password : string
  AccountCreatedDatetime : datetime
  isArchived : boolean
  createAccount()
  deleteAccount()
  editAccount()
  forgotPassword()
}

class Recipe {
  recipeID : int
  recipeName : string
  servings : int
  prepTime : time
  cookTime : time
  totalTime : time
  isFavorite : boolean
  createRecipe()
  editRecipe()
  deleteRecipe()
  saveRecipe()
}

class RecipeImage {
  RecipeImageID : int
  RecipeImagePath : int
  isArchived : boolean
  AddPhoto()
  DeletePhoto()
}

class Ingredient {
  IngredientID : int
  IngredientText : string
  IngredientAmount : int
  isArchived : boolean
  AddIngredient()
  EditIngredient()
  DeleteIngredient()
}

class Instructions {
  getSteps()
}

class Measurement {
  MeasurementID : int
  MeasurementText : string
  getMeasurement()
}

class Step {
  StepID : int
  InstructionStepText : string
  StepNumberOrder : int
  isArchived : boolean
  AddStep()
  EditStep()
  RemoveStep()
}

Account "0..*" -- Recipe
Recipe "1" *-- "*" Ingredient
Recipe "1" -- "1" Instructions
Recipe "1" o-- "1" RecipeImage
Ingredient "1" -- "1" Measurement
Instructions "1" *-- "*" Step

@enduml
```
